steps.title: Spot the relationship between the sentences
steps.content: The first sentence states a general claim: Mary Ellen Pleasant earned her title after “successfully challenging discrimination in the state.” The second sentence provides a specific example of this challenge: her 1866 streetcar lawsuit.

steps.title: Apply the transition that shows this relationship
steps.content: Specifically introduces a concrete example illustrating a general statement. The other three choices either reverse causality, present chronological sequence without logical connection, or treat this as a separate parallel point. That confirms D is correct.
